betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Elite Plating§f:
Elite Plating (nuclearcraft:part, metadata 3) is the top-tier composite plate in NC. It is a radiation- and impact-resistant shell used as the chassis for QMD's beamline and accelerator components.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:392)§f:
Pattern "RBR / BPB / RBR" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: R = dustCrystalBinder, B = ingotBoron, P = plateDU. Yields 1 Elite Plating. Crystal binder and boron surround a DU-plate core, forming an ultra-dense composite.

§6Why Elite Plating Matters§f:
Elite Plating is the structural material for QMD's most demanding multiblocks — beamline frames, vacuum chambers, and accelerator casings. The boron captures neutrons, the crystal binder locks the alloy in place, and the DU core provides the mass needed to safely contain high-energy particle beams.

§6Direct Descendants of Elite Plating (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 10 items that use Elite Plating in their crafting recipe:
- qmd:linear_accelerator_controller (Linear Accelerator Controller)
- qmd:ring_accelerator_controller (Synchrotron Accelerator Controller)
- qmd:decelerator_controller (Decelerator Controller)
- qmd:mass_spectrometer_controller (Mass Spectrometer Controller)
- qmd:accelerator_laser_ion_source (Accelerator Laser Ion Source)
- trinity:bomb_antimatter (Antimatter Bomb)
- qmd:target_chamber_controller (Target Chamber Controller)
- qmd:decay_chamber_controller (Decay Chamber Controller)
- qmd:beam_dump_controller (Beam Dump Controller)
- nuclearcraft:rad_shielding (Radiation Scrubber)

§6Upstream Materials§f:
Crafting Elite Plating consumes ingotBoron (or hbm:ingot_boron), dustCrystalBinder (a processed output from the Manufactory or Ingot Former chain), and plateDU. Boron and DU Plating are both gating tech — make sure those lines are running first.

§6Usage Tier (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:388-401)§f:
Elite Plating sits at tier 3 (the top tier) of NC's plating progression. Basic (Pb+C) -> Advanced (Redstone+Tough+Basic) -> DU (Sulfur+U-238+Advanced) -> Elite (Crystal Binder+Boron+DU). Once you can craft Elite Plating, you have access to the entire QMD multiblock tree.

§eTip§f: Elite Plating is the gating material for every QMD controller. Before you even start QMD progression, set up a mass-production line for Elite Plating using an NC Assembler with speed upgrades.

§eTip§f: To make dustCrystalBinder in bulk, process sand or quartz through the Rock Crusher and combine the output with a binder agent in a Manufactory. The Manufactory is unlocked at the same time as the Ingot Former.

§cWarning§f: Crystal Binder requires precise ratios — putting too much in a single recipe will cause the Manufactory to jam. Use a dedicated Assembler with a strict pattern to avoid spoilage.
